meaning: adj.波美拉尼亚 的n.波美拉尼亚 人,波美拉尼亚种小狗
examples: This Pomeranian went as a sightseeing bus.
Pomeranian was one of only three dogs known to have survived the disaster.
The wonderfully-named Pomeranian Spitzel relaxes in the Bavarian village of Hailing.
Singapore's top television actress and certified pooch-lover is "mother" to a seven-year-old Pomeranian and a two-year-old Dachshund.
Apparently, she didn't appreciate being delayed for a drunk whose lip was bitten off by his Pomeranian.
